project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: 文章浏览记录（标题、项目ID、命名空间ID、时间戳、浏览时长）
project_privacy_data_flows.description: 每次查看文章时，浏览记录持久化到WMFData Core Data存储，包含文章标识和浏览时长

flow_steps.code:
let pageViewsDataController = try WMFPageViewsDataController()
let objectID = try await pageViewsDataController.addPageView(title: title, namespaceID: Int16(namespace.rawValue), project: wmfProject, previousPageViewObjectID: previousPageViewObjectID, timestamp: timestamp)
flow_steps.details: 文章加载完成后触发页面浏览记录持久化

flow_steps.code: public func addPageView(title: String, namespaceID: Int16, project: WMFProject, previousPageViewObjectID: NSManagedObjectID?, timestamp: Date? = nil) async throws -> NSManagedObjectID?
flow_steps.details: 创建CDPage（标题、项目ID、命名空间ID、时间戳）和CDPageView（时间戳、前一个页面视图关联）Core Data对象
浏览时长（秒数）累加到CDPageView.numberOfSeconds字段
在WMFArticle实体上设置viewedDate为当前日期

project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: 遗留浏览数据迁移（标题、项目、浏览日期，可选经纬度坐标）
project_privacy_data_flows.description: 将遗留WMFArticle存储中的一年内浏览记录和位置数据迁移到新的WMFData Core Data存储

flow_steps.details: 从遗留Core Data读取一年内的浏览记录，转换为WMFLegacyPageView对象（包含标题、项目、浏览日期）
遗留浏览数据导入到新的CDPage和CDPageView Core Data实体

project_privacy_data_flows.description: 用户浏览文章超过30秒时在WMFArticle Core Data实体上标记为显著浏览

flow_steps.code:
significantlyViewedTimer = Timer.scheduledTimer(withTimeInterval: 30, repeats: false, block: { [weak self] (timer) in
    self.article.wasSignificantlyViewed = true
flow_steps.details: 用户停留在文章页面30秒以上时触发
wasSignificantlyViewed = true存储到WMFArticle Core Data实体

project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: 页面浏览记录自动清理
project_privacy_data_flows.description: 系统会自动删除超过一年的页面浏览记录和关联的空页面

flow_steps.code:
let timestamp = NSPredicate(format: "timestamp < %@", argumentArray: [oneYearAgoDate])
guard let pageViewsToDelete = try self.fetch(entityType: CDPageView.self, predicate: timestamp, fetchLimit: 2000, in: backgroundContext)
flow_steps.details: 系统定期清理超过一年的页面浏览记录和关联的空页面

flow_steps.code:
let compoundPredicate = NSCompoundPredicate(andPredicateWithSubpredicates: [timestamp, emptyPageViewsPredicate, emptyArticleTabItemsPredicate, savedPageInfoPredicate])
guard let pagesToDelete = try self.fetch(entityType: CDPage.self, predicate: compoundPredicate, fetchLimit: 2000, in: backgroundContext)
flow_steps.details: 删除超过一年且无关联页面视图、标签页或保存信息的页面记录
